problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation may resolve How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
